generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded IoT actuator controlling building lighting systems with tenant-specific configuration endpoints extracted from BIM models"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building HVAC system actuator supporting adaptive control policies including reinforcement learning-based optimization (BOREALIS)"
]

instance ShadingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated shading device controller integrated with environmental sensor data for occupant comfort optimization"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy IoT sensor monitoring human presence in building spaces with real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor deployed throughout building infrastructure for HVAC control and energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Relative humidity sensor providing runtime data for indoor air quality monitoring and system performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor enabling adaptive lighting control strategies through real-time feedback loops"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitoringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption sensor tracking real-time power usage across all connected systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitoringSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Comprehensive Building Information Modeling (BIM) model serving as the semantic backbone containing geometric, topological, and component relationship data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance RuntimeSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation output containing runtime semantics including sensor configurations and control logic extracted from BIM"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, ModelTransformationEngine
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured occupancy data derived from sensor transmissions, used for space utilization analysis and control policy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated environmental data including temperature, humidity, and light levels processed for building performance simulation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics processed for predictive modeling and operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source IoT connectivity platform enabling real-time data ingestion and lightweight device management for sensor networks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented Digital Twin platform facilitating bidirectional communication between physical systems and virtual representations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeControlService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity 3D visualization engine providing immersive interfaces for real-time monitoring and user interaction"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ModelTransformationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation framework automating generation of DT artifacts from BIM models using M2M/M2T mappings"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentPipelineService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of operational parameters through Unreal Engine 5 interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDashboardInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating building performance using runtime data and BIM models to identify energy savings and comfort optimization opportunities"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsInsight, ComfortRecommendationInsight
]

instance AutomatedControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing user-defined or AI-driven control strategies with bidirectional communication to physical systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingAction, HVACOptimizationAction
]

instance LifecycleManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service supporting design-to-operation workflows including clash detection, commissioning, and maintenance planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationInsight, ClashDetectionInsight
]

instance TwinLightControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User-centered lighting control system implementing adaptive strategies based on occupancy and environmental data"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of real-time operational parameters including energy consumption and occupancy status"
]

instance EnergySavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis identifying potential energy savings through optimized lighting schedules and HVAC setpoints"
]

instance ComfortRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of environmental data trends recommending adaptive control policies for improved occupant comfort"
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Machine learning-based detection of equipment degradation with proactive maintenance suggestions"
]

instance ClashDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lifecycle management analysis identifying potential design conflicts during construction phases"
]

instance RealTimeAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated system alert generation for environmental anomalies detected through sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic lighting control implementation based on occupancy patterns and natural light availability"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based HVAC control strategy optimizing energy consumption while maintaining comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "TwinLight project implementation of user-centered adaptive lighting control strategies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environments/Components
instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment containing all operational systems and embedded IoT components"
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor,
                   EnergyMonitoringSensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator, ShadingActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinRuntime : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment hosting all DT services, models, and data processing components"
    base:contains BIMModel, RuntimeSemanticModel, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5,
                   ModelTransformationEngine
]

// C13: Additional Required Components
instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data ingestion from IoT devices through Eclipse Hono"
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing device configurations and lifecycle operations"
]

instance RuntimeControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing runtime control logic based on processed data and BIM models"
]

instance ConfigurationManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing runtime configuration of digital twin components"
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing visualization capabilities through Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance InteractiveDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling interactive user interfaces for building operations"
]

instance DeploymentPipelineService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing automated deployment of digital twin artifacts"
]

instance SemanticEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enhancing data with semantic information from BIM models"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing energy consumption based on predictive analytics"
]

instance HVACControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service controlling HVAC systems based on environmental data"
]

instance LifecycleCostService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service calculating lifecycle costs and operational expenses"
]

instance OccupantComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing and optimizing occupant comfort conditions"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves the **generation and transmission of control signals** from the DT back to the physical Building Control System (BCS). The framework supports **closed-loop control** by enabling the DT to process real-time data and generate **outputs** (e.g., control commands) that adjust physical systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC). While specific protocols like MQTT or HTTP are not mentioned, the text emphasizes **bidirectional communication** between the DT and BCS, ensuring that the DT can **execute control logic** and **adjust operational parameters** dynamically. This interaction is critical for achieving real-time synchronization and optimization."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time data exchange** with low-latency requirements to support dynamic interactions between the DT and physical systems. While specific time scales (e.g., milliseconds to days) are not explicitly quantified, the framework emphasizes **real-time synchronization** for operational decision-making. The DT must process and respond to sensor data and control signals **in near real-time** to enable effective monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of this real-time synchronization over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, middleware-integrated ecosystem** with the following components:
  - **BIM Core**: The **semantic backbone** providing spatial, geometric, and functional data of the building infrastructure.
  - **IoT Layer**: **Eclipse Hono** acts as the **IoT gateway**, aggregating sensor data and routing commands to physical devices.
  - **DT Platform**: **Eclipse Ditto** hosts the **runtime DT instance**, managing **service composition**, **data synchronization**, and **control logic execution**.
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides an **interactive 3D interface** for monitoring and controlling the DT.
  - **Extension Services**: **Modular plugins** (e.g., energy optimization, predictive maintenance) are integrated via Ditto’s **service mesh**, enabling **scalable, domain-specific functionality**.
  The constellation follows a **publish-subscribe model** for data exchange, ensuring **loose coupling** between components and **high interoperability** across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all phases of the building life cycle**, from **design to operation and maintenance**, with distinct representation phases:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with **semantic metadata** (e.g., device configurations, control logic) to prepare for DT deployment.
  - **Construction phase**: **As-built BIM models** are validated against physical assets, and IoT devices are commissioned via the DT framework.
  - **Operation phase**: The DT **continuously synchronizes** with physical systems, enabling real-time monitoring, control, and optimization (e.g., energy savings, occupant comfort).
  - **Maintenance phase**: The DT supports **predictive maintenance** by analyzing sensor data (e.g., equipment wear) and generating alerts for proactive interventions.
  The framework ensures **backward compatibility** with legacy BIM models and **forward extensibility** for emerging technologies (e.g., AI, 5G)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which evaluates the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart. The framework addresses **semantic drift** by continuously synchronizing runtime data with BIM models and ensuring that the DT reflects the current state of the physical system. While specific verification methods (e.g., Alloy) are not mentioned, the text emphasizes the importance of **synchronization techniques** to maintain model integrity and support decision-making."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for **real-time data exchange**, enabling bidirectional communication between the physical system and the DT. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) are not detailed, the framework supports **standardized middleware integration** to facilitate seamless data transmission. The connection ensures low-latency interaction for real-time monitoring and control, though exact latency specifications are not provided."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **scalable architecture** that supports modular integration and extensibility. The framework does not specify exact hosting infrastructure (e.g., AWS, Azure), but it emphasizes **scalable deployment** to accommodate growing complexity and evolving requirements. The focus is on **automated deployment** and **modular service integration**, ensuring that the DT can be scaled and adapted without significant overhead."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** through **standardized extension points**, allowing for the integration of custom services and external systems. While specific external systems (e.g., AWS IoT) are not mentioned, the framework enables seamless communication with **heterogeneous platforms** via middleware (e.g., Eclipse Hono, Ditto). This integration facilitates the exchange of data with other digital ecosystems, ensuring interoperability and scalability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT system adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, primarily **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which provides the **semantic backbone** for **device modeling, control logic, and runtime configurations**. The framework leverages **open-source middleware** (Eclipse Hono, Ditto) for **standardized IoT connectivity** and **service-oriented architectures**. While **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** and **COBie (Construction Operations Building Information Exchange)** are **commonly associated with BIM**, they are not explicitly mentioned in the provided documents as part of the DT standardization process."
]
